content: iOS Safari storage eviction: Safari 17+ (iOS 17+) supports navigator.storage.persist(). Origin in persistent mode is excluded from eviction. Request on first launch. WebKit grants persistent mode based on heuristics including whether app is opened as Home Screen Web App. Even in non-persistent mode, iOS 17+ increased quotas to 60% of disk. Call navigator.storage.persist() early, check result, show user guidance if denied.
